```json
{
  "verdict": "no/ESCALATE",
  "material_blocker": "Noncompliant callback source",
  "evidence": [
    "The callback was made to the submitted contact phone number (+1-406-555-0187) provided in the portal change request (PORTAL-CHG-9F4B7), which is not the pre-change vendor-master source.",
    "The pre-change vendor-master snapshot (VM-SNAP-V-JHE-9031-20241122) indicates the phone number on file was +1-406-555-0129, which is different from the number used for callback verification.",
    "The policy (AP-POL-2024-017) explicitly requires callback verification using pre-change vendor-master source data, not data from the change request or submitted contact."
  ],
  "reasoning": "The callback verification process did not adhere to the compliance requirements specified in the policy. The callback was conducted using a phone number from the portal change request rather than the pre-change vendor-master record. This discrepancy introduces a risk of unauthorized changes, as the callback source does not confirm the legitimacy of the change through the established vendor-master data. Despite other controls being in place, the policy mandates that callback-source lineage is a critical factor in approving payment, and this requirement has not been met. Therefore, the payment should not be released until the callback is verified against the pre-change vendor-master data."
}
```
